Name: UMediaTexture
Description: Implements a texture asset for rendering video tracks from UMediaPlayer assets.

Variables.Name: AddressX
Variables.Description: The addressing mode to use for the X axis.

Variables.Name: AddressY
Variables.Description: The addressing mode to use for the Y axis.

Variables.Name: AutoClear
Variables.Description: Whether to clear the texture when no media is being played (default = enabled).

Variables.Name: ClearColor
Variables.Description: The color used to clear the texture if AutoClear is enabled (default = black).

Variables.Name: MediaPlayer
Variables.Description: The media player asset associated with this texture.

Functions.Name: GetAspectRatio
Functions.Description: Gets the current aspect ratio of the texture.

Functions.Name: GetHeight
Functions.Description: Gets the current height of the texture.

Functions.Name: GetWidth
Functions.Description: Gets the current width of the texture.

Functions.Name: ResetFirstFrame
Functions.Description: Reset The IsFirstFrameRender&IsFirstFrameNotify to false for iOS
